allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Phase 1: Usable Kernel + Interfaces + Boot Discipline

Major changes:

**Per-Agent Outboxes:**
- Relay now creates separate outboxes for each agent \(drevan, cypher, gaia\)
- Updated enqueue_outbox\(\) to route replies to phx:outbox:discord:{agent_id}
- Modified get_queue_lengths\(\) to return nested outbox structure
- Updated drainer and fast path to use per-agent routing

**Environment Standardization:**
- All services now use python-dotenv for configuration
- Added fail-fast validation at startup for all services
- Safe config summaries print at startup \(no secrets exposed\)
- Made all hardcoded values env-loadable \(timeouts, retries, intervals\)

**Multi-Agent Discord Bot Architecture:**
- Added AGENT_ID and OUTBOX_KEY to each bot''s .env file
- Implemented --env flag support with argparse \(e.g., python bot.py --env .env.drevan\)
- Each bot instance loads agent-specific configuration
- Three independent Discord bot processes \(one per agent\)

**Brain Service Configuration:**
- Created new services/brain/config.py module
- Added INFERENCE_ENABLED flag \(defaults to false for Phase 1\)
- Implemented config validation and safe summary printing
- Added dotenv loading with explicit .env.brain file

**Web UI Updates:**
- Updated status display to handle nested outbox structure
- Shows per-agent outbox counts \(D:0 C:0 G:0 format\)

**Testing & Validation:**
- Created comprehensive scripts/smoke_test.ps1
- Tests 8 scenarios: health, status, fast path, queue path, drainer, outbox, dedup
- Fixed relay tests to match new enqueue_outbox signature
- All services use 127.0.0.1 instead of localhost

**Documentation:**
- Updated CLAUDE.md with Phase 1 implementation status
- Completely rewrote RUNBOOK.md with operational instructions
- Added troubleshooting guides for multi-bot issues

Phase 1 Status: COMPLETE ✓
All services validated with startup config checks
System ready for end-to-end testing with stub replies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
